title: Project Wrap-Up & Diagnostics
concept: Debugging common training issues like overfitting or vanishing gradients, and saving the final model. 'Mini Project: Image Classifier is complete!'.

exercises.prompt: What do we use to measure how well our model performs on unseen data?
exercises.explain: Accuracy tells us how many predictions our model got right on the test data.

cards.title: Debugging Common Issues
cards.body: Sometimes models don't work perfectly. It's important to find out what went wrong, like overfitting or gradients that vanish.

cards.title: Overfitting
cards.body: Overfitting happens when a model learns the training data too well, performing badly on unseen data.

cards.title: Understanding Overfitting
cards.body: Imagine a student who memorizes textbook answers without understanding the concepts. They might ace the exam but fail to solve real problems.

cards.title: Signs of Overfitting
cards.body: If your model shows high accuracy on training data but low accuracy on test data, it might be overfitting.

cards.title: False Belief: More Data Always Helps
cards.body: Adding more data doesn't guarantee better performance if the model is overfitting. It needs to generalize.

cards.title: Model Performance
cards.body: Observe the difference between training and test accuracy.

exercises.prompt: What should you do to prevent overfitting?
exercises.explain: Using early stopping helps you terminate training before the model starts to overfit.

exercises.prompt: True or False: Vanishing gradients can stop the training process altogether.
exercises.explain: True, vanishing gradients can prevent the model from learning during training.

exercises.prompt: To save the final model, we use the function ____.
exercises.sentence: To save the final model, we use the function save_model().
exercises.explain: The correct function to save the model is save_model() which preserves its state.

exercises.prompt: Which code snippet correctly saves a trained model?
exercises.explain: The correct option calls save_model(model) to preserve the trained model.

exercises.prompt: What are two common issues when training a model and how can you address them?
exercises.explain: Overfitting can be addressed using techniques like early stopping, while vanishing gradients often require changes in model architecture or choosing different activation functions. Mini Project: Image Classifier is complete!
